text:
us and the Moon are inimical. The exchange of places between the Moon
and Mars will give opportunities for gambling so the husband was given to
gambling but always he lost as Mars was in debilitation. The husband traded
in wines,jaggery etc., all sweet.
In the present case as Jupiter has the Moon in the second, Saturn in the
third to his place and Ketu in the fourth, the native could never have happy sex
relations with his first wife. Only when Jupiter contacts Venus in Scorpio and
when the native marries another woman he will have marital harmony.
As Saturn has exchanged places with the Sun, when Saturn transits
Capricorn his conjunction with Mercury helps the native to own a house and
some landed property. As Venus is in the 11th to Capricorn and 4th to Leo, he
will become very rich and also own a beautiful house to live in.
Generally speaking, if Saturn contacts the Moon, Mercury and Ketu
(Mars and Sun) in a sequence, the native will be a wanderer till about 35th
year.
